reason: Adding ConnectionStatus + status to GameSnapshot is a cross-layer contract change — Rust serde and TS union must stay in lockstep; connected derived from status.
The snapshot is emitted over the sc2://game event; payload shape + serde naming conventions apply.
ConnectionStatus union + status field must be strictly typed; DiagnosticPanel switches on the enum.
Snapshot test fixtures (tauriMocks/hook tests) must add the new status field and keep mocks mirroring the real contract.
